description: Regions where cultural norms emphasise individual self-reliance and personal task management. Service sector exists but self-service is the norm for routine daily tasks.
source_note: Stylised from ILO ILOSTAT 2022-2024 averages for OECD high-income economies with strong individual autonomy norms (WVS Wave 7 corroborated). No specific country named.

description: Regions with mixed norms: some tasks are typically delegated (professional services) while others are self-managed. Represents a transitional or balanced state.
source_note: Stylised from ILO ILOSTAT 2022-2024 averages for middle-income economies and transitional societies.

description: Regions where extensive service delegation is the norm. Daily tasks (cooking, errands, maintenance) are commonly outsourced. Service industry is large and competitive.
source_note: Stylised from ILO ILOSTAT 2022-2024 averages for high-growth economies where service sector employment exceeds 60% and average working hours are among the highest globally.
